project_info.name: Rêv'dô
project_info.description: Premium pool maintenance and repair company in La Réunion. Luxury minimalist design, fluid, reliable, and high-end.

theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Pool maintenance requires trust and serenity (Light theme foundation), while the 'luxe minimaliste' request dictates deep, jewel-tone accents (Bleu profond + Bleu aqua) to signify premium, high-end service. Warm minimalism ensures it feels human and inviting, not clinical.

colors.primary_description: Bleu profond (Deep Blue) - Used for primary headings, deep backgrounds, and high-contrast elements.
colors.secondary_description: Bleu aqua (Aqua Blue) - Used for CTA buttons, interactive hover states, and energetic accents (e.g., Emergency banner).
colors.background_alt_description: Cream/Off-white (matches logo background) - Used for alternating sections and bento cards.
colors.accent_description: Subtle gold/champagne for premium touches if needed (stars, small dividers).

typography.instruction: Do not center headings by default. Left-align for editorial luxury feel. Ensure 'tracking-tight' for headings to maintain a modern, premium aesthetic.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for main sections. Gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Use bento-style asymmetrical grids or pure clean CSS grids. The 11 services should be displayed in a dense but clean grid (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or 4) with 1px borders and subtle hover lifts.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with 1px bottom border border-white/20.
surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-white or bg-[#F8F9FA]), 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), no heavy drop shadows. On hover: -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg.
surfaces.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay over the hero image (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0B2545]/90 via-[#0B2545]/50 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast while maintaining the luxury image visibility.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling mandatory (lenis or smooth scroll-behavior).
motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must have visible hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#008CC2] for Aqua buttons).
motion_and_interaction.animations: Subtle entrance animations using framer-motion (fade in, slide up). Staggered grid item reveals.
motion_and_interaction.background_effect: Subtle water/wave effect in background: implement a slowly translating/scaling absolute background image (the rippling water unsplash image) with heavy backdrop blur and low opacity to simulate water movement without distracting.

components_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a premium, lightweight look.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#00A8E8] text-white rounded-none or rounded-sm. Secondary: border border-[#0B2545] text-[#0B2545] bg-transparent. Hover states must increase contrast.
components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Inputs should have minimal design (border-b only, or very light 1px full border with rounded-sm bg-white).
components_instructions.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right corner. z-50. bg-green-500 rounded-full p-4 shadow-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform.

hero.title: Rêv'dô – L'excellence de la piscine à La Réunion
hero.subtitle: Entretien sur mesure • Dépannage rapide • Eau cristalline garantie
hero.description: Chaque piscine mérite une attention d'exception.

emergency_banner.placement: Top of the page or directly under hero. High visibility (e.g., bg-[#00A8E8] text-white py-3 text-center).

service_area.title: Zone d'Intervention
service_area.description: Sud, Nord, Ouest de La Réunion

why_us.title: Pourquoi Rêv'dô
items: 5 points premium (to be generated/structured by agent)

gallery.title: Galerie & Réalisations
gallery.layout: Asymmetrical Tetris grid showing before/after, tech room, and luxury finishes.

brand_phrases: L'exigence au service de votre piscine

logos.description: Rêv'dô Logo (Bleu profond & bleu aqua sur fond crème). Use in navbar and footer.

images.description: Luxury pool La Réunion. MANDATORY: Use as Hero section background with heavy left-to-right deep blue gradient overlay.
Avant/après piscine verte vers cristalline. Use in Gallery section.
Local technique. Use in Gallery or Services section.
Rippling blue water with sunlight reflections. Use for the subtle water/wave background effect (with low opacity and blur) behind certain sections like Contact or Services.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Format: kebab-case, role-based.
